_meta.source: SYNTHETIC — authored for this demo only
_meta.provenance: Illustrative commercial/MA/Medicaid overlay criteria. NOT real payer policy. NOT derived from any proprietary source. Clearly labeled synthetic per PRD Section 3.1.
_meta.disclaimer: These payer profiles are fictional and exist solely to demonstrate the payer-overlay architecture on top of public-domain CMS coverage data.

criteria.summary: Total knee arthroplasty covered with prior authorization. Adopts the CMS LCD conservative-care floor and adds a minimum 12-week supervised conservative therapy trial.
criteria.overlay_notes: Commercial overlay extends the federal LCD floor with an explicit 12-week trial duration.

criteria.summary: Established-patient office visit. Covered, no prior authorization required.
criteria.overlay_notes: No overlay beyond the CMS E/M baseline.

criteria_list: Documentation supporting level of E/M service

required_elements: Radiographic / imaging report confirming joint-space narrowing
Conservative therapy log spanning at least 12 weeks
NSAID or analgesic trial with documented response
Functional / pain assessment (e.g., WOMAC or equivalent)
blocking_elements: Radiographic / imaging report confirming joint-space narrowing
Conservative therapy log spanning at least 12 weeks

required_elements: History relevant to the presenting problem

criteria.summary: Medicare Advantage plan must cover at least the CMS LCD floor for major joint replacement and adds a 6-month conservative-management documentation requirement before authorization.
criteria.overlay_notes: MA plan applies a stricter 24-week conservative-management window than the commercial overlay; this is the criterion most often missing in submitted records.

criteria_list: Radiographic confirmation of advanced osteoarthritis (Kellgren-Lawrence grade 3-4)

required_elements: Radiographic / imaging report with Kellgren-Lawrence grading
Conservative-management history spanning at least 24 weeks
blocking_elements: Radiographic / imaging report with Kellgren-Lawrence grading
Conservative-management history spanning at least 24 weeks

criteria.summary: Medicaid managed-care plan covers major joint replacement with prior authorization and a state-mandated second-opinion requirement for members under 60.
criteria.overlay_notes: Adds a state second-opinion requirement not present in the federal floor.

criteria.summary: Established-patient office visit covered, no prior authorization required.
criteria.overlay_notes: No overlay beyond the CMS E/M baseline.

criteria_list: Second surgical opinion for members under 60

required_elements: Radiographic / imaging report confirming advanced osteoarthritis
Conservative therapy log spanning at least 12 weeks
blocking_elements: Radiographic / imaging report confirming advanced osteoarthritis
Conservative therapy log spanning at least 12 weeks
